prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-DMMSEDUJ-48PC-SML-PNK Product Type: EARRING Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Junior Minnie Mouse Bowtique Sticker Earrings 24 Pairs Girls Dress Up Description: The Minnie Mouse earrings are easy to peel and stick and will make your child feel like they are on an adventure with Minnie and her pals. This set comes with 24 pairs of brightly colored sticker earrings, all featuring different designs of your child's favorite Disney character.

These make great stocking stuffers, party favors and gifts for young girls. This set is the perfect gift for any fans of Disney and Minnie Mouse.

Please Note: All merchandise listed for sale is officially licensed, 100% authentic for worldwide distribution Search Terms: girls gifts stocking stuffers disney dress up for christmas Features: - Officially Licensed Disney Junior Minnie Mouse 24 Pair Earring Set - Features 24 Different Designs - Easily Removable - Just Peel & Stick - Recommended for Ages 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Minnie Mouse 24-Pair Pink Sticker Earrings

openai.item_name: Disney 24-Pair Minnie Mouse Bowtique Sticker Earrings

anthropic.title_differentiation: 24 Different Designs, Peel And Stick, Easily Removable, Ages 3 Plus, Girls Dress Up

openai.title_differentiation: 24 Different Designs, Peel And Stick, Easy Removable, Ages 3, Officially Licensed, Party Favors, Stocking Stuffers
